title: sphaerostigma micranthum
intro: Sphaerostigma micranthum, also known as Donkey's Ears, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as demonstrating potential anti-cancer properties. Sphaerostigma micranthum can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
